text: Here's what science actually says about B12 nerve health. Vitamin B12 is crucial for nerve function. But why? Deficiency can lead to nerve damage, causing tingling and weakness. Studies show B12 helps produce myelin, the nerve's protective sheath. But recent research is ongoing. Not all findings are conclusive yet. Curious about how B12 affects your health? Follow for more insights!
